abnormal_structure.description: Gives valuable artifacts after defeating its guard.

alvars_eye.description: Gives common and valuable resources after defeating its guard.

overgrown_grave.description: Gives Gold and possibly also valuable artifacts after defeating its guard.

boreal_call.description: Defeat its guard to obtain Abyssal Envoys.

orb_observatory.description: Permanently increases each visiting hero's Spell Power or Knowledge by {0} for {1} Gold.

infernal_cirque.description: Allows each visiting hero to learn up to {0} random Expert skills or level them up.

iridescent_abbey.description: Gives Gold and Gems after defeating its guard.

knowledge_garden.name: Knowledge Garden
knowledge_garden.description: Permanently increases each visiting hero's Knowledge by {0}.

learning_stone.name: Learning Stone

legions_memorial.description: Gives Gold, Wood, and Ore after defeating its guard.

maze.name: Living Maze
maze.description: Permanently increases each visiting hero's chosen attribute by {0}.

lost_library.name: Lost Library
lost_library.description: Gives the first visiting hero {0} XP.

magic_wheel.name: Magic Wheel
magic_wheel.description: Permanently increases each visiting hero's Spell Power by {0}.

mereas_shrine.name: Mearea's Altar
mereas_shrine.description: Grants Gold after defeating its guard.

college_of_wonder.name: Mountain Monastery
college_of_wonder.description: Permanently increases each visiting hero's Attack, Defense, Spell Power, and Knowledge by {0} for {1} Gold.

unstable_ruins.name: Overgrown Vori Ruins
unstable_ruins.description: Gives a very large amount of Gold and resources after defeating its guard.

fort.name: Pauper Knight Order
fort.description: Permanently increases each visiting hero's Attack or Defense by {0} for {1} Gold.

petrified_memorial.description: Defeat its guard to obtain Medusae.

point_of_balance.name: Point of Balance
point_of_balance.description: Defeat its guard to obtain Sentinels of Glory.

raiders_camp.name: Raiders' Camp
raiders_camp.description: Gives Gold and possibly also valuable artifacts after defeating its guard.

research_laboratory.name: Research Laboratory
research_laboratory.description: Gives a very large amount of Gold and valuable artifacts after defeating its guard.

ritual_pyre.name: Ritual Pyre
ritual_pyre.description: Defeat its guard to obtain Phoenixes.

trial_scales.name: Scales of Worth
trial_scales.description: Permanently increases each visiting hero's chosen attribute by {0}.

stinging_sword.name: Stinging Sword
stinging_sword.description: Permanently increases each visiting hero's Attack by {0}.

armory_automaton.name: Summit Automaton
armory_automaton.description: Permanently increases each visiting hero's Defense by {0}.

unforgotten_grave.name: Tomb of Vigilance
unforgotten_grave.description: Defeat its guard to obtain Dread Knights.

circus.description: Levels up a random skill for each visiting hero.

tree_of_knowledge.name: Tree of Knowledge
tree_of_knowledge.description: Gives one level to each visiting hero.

troglodyte_throne.name: Troglodyte Throne
troglodyte_throne.description: Gives a very large amount of Gold after defeating its guard.

shady_den.name: Trophy Hunter's Den
shady_den.description: Once per week, gives the first visiting hero a random reward.

twilight_bloom.name: Twilight Bloom
twilight_bloom.description: Gives Gold and a valuable artifact after defeating its guard.

uncanny_rite.name: Uncanny Rite
uncanny_rite.description: Gives Gold and Mercury after defeating its guard.

underground_lair.name: Underground Labyrinth
underground_lair.description: Defeat its guards to obtain Basilisks. Guards and Basilisks respawn every week.

university.name: University
university.description: Allows each visiting hero to learn up to {0} random skills for {1} Gold each.

wise_owl.name: Wise Owl
wise_owl.description: Teaches a random skill to each visiting hero. If they already know this skill, levels it up instead.

peasant_cart.name: Abandoned Cart
peasant_cart.description: Once per game, grants a random small reward.

storage_dust.name: Alchemical Dust Storage
storage_dust.description: Once per week, gives {0} Alchemical Dust to the first visiting hero.

alchemy_lab.name: Alchemical Lab
alchemy_lab.description: Allows Gems, Crystals and Mercury to be converted into Alchemical Dust.

mystical_tower.name: Altar of Insight
mystical_tower.description: Grants {0} Insight(s) to the first visiting hero. It can be used as usual to learn or upgrade Global Map spells.

altar_of_magic_3.name: Arcane Shrine
altar_of_magic_3.description: Allows the hero to pick and learn {0} out of {1} random Arcane spells.

beer_fountain.name: Beer Fountain
beer_fountain.description: Increases each visiting hero's Luck by {0} until the end of the week.

camp_fire.name: Campfire
camp_fire.description: Gives a small amount of random resources.

crow_nest.name: Crow Nest
crow_nest.description: Once per game, grants a random small reward.

storage_crystals.name: Crystal Storage
storage_crystals.description: Once per week, gives {0} Crystals to the first visiting hero.

altar_of_magic_2.name: Daylight Shrine
altar_of_magic_2.description: Allows the hero to pick and learn {0} out of {1} random Daylight spells.

crystal_trail.name: Dragon Step
crystal_trail.description: Once per week for each hero, fully restores each visiting hero's mana, then doubles it.

enchanted_scroll_box.name: Enchanted Magic Scroll
enchanted_scroll_box.description: Allows the hero to use a specific spell at its maximum level.

huntsmans_camp.name: Explorer's Camp
huntsmans_camp.description: Restores {0}% of hero's maximum Movement points and {1}% maximum mana.

forge.name: Forge of the Second Man
forge.description: Allows visiting heroes to trade resources for artifacts.

abandoned_corpse.name: Forgotten Remains
abandoned_corpse.description: Once per game, grants a random small reward.

fickle_shrine.name: Four Scholars Shrine
fickle_shrine.description: Resets all skills and attributes gained from levels, allowing one to re‑train the hero. Only once per hero.

storage_gemstones.name: Gem Storage
storage_gemstones.description: Once per week, gives {0} Gems to the first visiting hero.

gingerbread_house.name: Gingerbread House
gingerbread_house.description: Once per week, gives the first visiting hero a valuable resource of their choice.

goblin_cache.name: Goblin Cache
goblin_cache.description: Once per game, grants a random small reward.

storage_gold.name: Gold Storage
storage_gold.description: Once per week, gives {0} Gold to the first visiting hero.

gardener.name: Magic Garden
gardener.description: Once per week, gives Gold or valuable resources to the first visiting hero.

scroll_box.name: Magic Scroll
scroll_box.description: Allows the hero to use a specific spell.

market.name: Marketplace
market.description: Allows visiting heroes to exchange their resources for different ones.

storage_mercury.name: Mercury Storage
storage_mercury.description: Once per week, gives {0} Mercury to the first visiting hero.

mythic_scroll_box.name: Mythic Magic Scroll
mythic_scroll_box.description: Allows the hero to use a special global map spell.

altar_of_magic_1.name: Nightshade Shrine
altar_of_magic_1.description: Allows the hero to pick and learn {0} out of {1} random Nightshade spells.

storage_ore.name: Ore Storage
storage_ore.description: Once per week, gives {0} Ore to the first visiting hero.

pandora_box.name: Pandora's Box
pandora_box.description: Gives an unpredictable but great reward.

pile_of_books.name: Pile of Books
pile_of_books.description: Increases XP gained by each visiting hero by {0}% until the end of the week.

pocket_dimension.name: Pocket Dimension
pocket_dimension.description: Allows heroes to leave creatures and artifacts here and immediately transfer them to any Remote Foothold or Pocket Dimension you control.

portal_1.name: Portal
portal_1.description: Teleports the visiting hero to a paired portal.

altar_of_magic_4.name: Primal Shrine
altar_of_magic_4.description: Allows the hero to pick and learn {0} out of {1} random Primal spells.

quixs_path.name: Quix's Altar
quixs_path.description: Increases each visiting hero's Morale by {0} until the end of the week.

watchtower.name: Redwood Observatory
watchtower.description: Removes the fog of war in a huge radius around it.

sacrificial_shrine.name: Sacrificial Shrine
sacrificial_shrine.description: Allows visiting heroes to sacrifice artifacts and creatures for experience.

stables.name: Stables
stables.description: Restores {0}% of hero's maximum Movement points and grants +{0}% until the end of the week.

tear_of_truth.name: Tear of Truth
tear_of_truth.description: Once per week for each hero, fully restores the hero's Movement points.

monty_hall.name: The Monty Hall
monty_hall.description: Once per game, offers a choice of {0} among {1} random artifacts.

town_gate.name: Town Gate
town_gate.description: Teleports the visiting hero to any chosen city under your control.

chest.name: Treasure Chest
chest.description: Gives a choice of either {0} Gold or half that amount in XP.

village.name: Village
village.description: Once per week, gives the first visiting hero a common resource of their choice.

mana_well.name: Well
mana_well.description: Fully restores each visiting hero's mana.

mysterious_stone.name: Whispering Stones
mysterious_stone.description: Increases each visiting hero's maximum mana by {0}% until the end of the week.

windmill.name: Windmill
windmill.description: Once per week, gives the first visiting hero a small amount of random resources.

storage_wood.name: Wood Storage
storage_wood.description: Once per week, gives {0} Wood to the first visiting hero.

flattering_mirror.name: World Mirror
flattering_mirror.description: Removes the fog of war in a small radius around each Mirror on the map.

gladiator_arena.name: Hell Light Arena
gladiator_arena.description: The Arena of Champions! After it's visited and a few days pass, a battle will occur. The winner of the battle wins the game. If the enemy does not appear, you win by default.

arena.name: Pit of Glory
arena.description: Allows visiting heroes to upgrade their creatures for Gold.

remote_foothold.name: Remote Foothold
remote_foothold.description: Allows heroes to leave creatures and artifacts here and immediately transfer them to another Remote Foothold you control.

abandoned_outpost.name: Abandoned Outpost
abandoned_outpost.description: Defeat its guard to transform this outpost into a city of your starting faction.

tree_of_abundance.name: Arborcopia
tree_of_abundance.description: Once per game, triggers one week of creature growth in all cities under the player's control.

celestial_sphere.name: Celestial Spire
celestial_sphere.description: Allows the study of all spells contained within the magical observatory.

chimerologist.name: Chimerologist
chimerologist.description: Allows visiting heroes to trade creatures for other, random creatures.

eternal_dragon.name: Eternal Dragon
eternal_dragon.description: Allows visiting heroes to transform their dragons into very powerful Lich Dragons.

prison.name: Hero Cage
prison.description: Unlock to release a friendly hero.

insaras_eye.name: Insara's Eye
insaras_eye.description: Gives the owner an additional level of knowledge about their opponents, as well as {0} Law points daily.

mirage.name: Mirage
mirage.description: Defeat your better self to coalesce the illusion into a Grail. This treasure will allow the hero to build a unique and wondrous building in a city.

tavern.name: Tavern
tavern.description: Allows visiting heroes to recruit additional heroes.

heros_crypt.name: Tomb of a Nameless Hero
heros_crypt.description: Once per game, grants a random artifact. Curses its plunderer.
